/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_upper_phy_metrics.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_upper_phy_metrics.dir/upper_phy_ldpc_metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_upper_phy_metrics.dir/upper_phy_pdsch_metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_upper_phy_metrics.dir/upper_phy_pusch_metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_upper_phy_metrics.dir/upper_phy_metrics_collector_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_upper_phy_metrics.a
